description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.1: Named memory profiles (Issue #5) — create, switch, and isolate memory stores per project, per shell, or per MCP client via `roampal profile` commands or `ROAMPAL_PROFILE` env. Sidecar scoring input cap (8K) aligned with fact-extraction cap. 52 new profile tests, 564 backend tests passing.
